title: AES names University of Dayton Students as the 2022 Energy Innovation Challenge Winners
text: AES' Competition Serves to Encourage Innovation by the Next Generation of Energy Industry Professionals ARLINGTON, Va. , Oct. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) today announced the winners of its 2022 Energy Innovation Challenge.

title: 11 October Inflation Busting Dividend Dogs Ready To Buy

title: AES Dedicates 227 MW, 908 MWh of Energy Storage Projects in Southern California
text: The combined Luna and Lancaster Area Battery Storage projects represent one of the largest battery storage installations in the world ARLINGTON, Va., Oct. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ — The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) today marked the dedication of its 100 MW, 400 MWh Luna Battery Storage and 127 MW, 508 MWh Lancaster Area Battery Storage (LAB) facilities in […]...

title: AES Dedicates 227 MW, 908 MWh of Energy Storage Projects in Southern California
text: The combined Luna and Lancaster Area Battery Storage projects represent one of the largest battery storage installations in the world ARLINGTON, Va. , Oct. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) today marked the dedication of its 100 MW, 400 MWh Luna Battery Storage and 127 MW, 508 MWh Lancaster Area Battery Storage (LAB) facilities in Lancaster, California.

title: AES Announces Third Quarter 2022 Financial Review Conference Call to be Held on Friday, November 4, 2022 at 10:00 a.m. ET
text: ARLINGTON, Va. , Oct. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) will host a conference call on Friday, November 4, 2022 at 10:00 a.m.
